summary: Issue #401 Phase 2.6 listing/inventory Decision workflows: intent-review spec_fidelity=pass consumed as given. WF2–4 review stages and FBS timelines wired into shared shells; Approve enabled for WF1–4; lifecycle completes on last succeeded outcome; 6/6 ACs mapped; demo 80 + contracts 4 tests green. No CRITICAL reliability/security findings in mock-only Demo surface.

mappings.criterion: returns five stages for workflow 2 with analytics deep-link
mappings.test: apps/demo/src/lib/workflows/optimize-product/__tests__/review.test.ts::returns five stages for workflow 2 with analytics deep-link

mappings.criterion: starts workflow 2 with optimize_product tool and eleven-step timeline
mappings.test: apps/demo/src/lib/__tests__/executions.test.ts::starts workflow 2 with optimize_product tool and eleven-step timeline

mappings.criterion: labels FBT scaffold as unfilled and margin-floor guard in preview without inventing thresholds
mappings.test: apps/demo/src/lib/workflows/optimize-product/__tests__/review.test.ts::labels FBT scaffold as unfilled and margin-floor guard in preview without inventing thresholds

mappings.criterion: does not fabricate a supplier or ERP integration contract in preview or approve
mappings.test: apps/demo/src/lib/workflows/replenish-inventory/__tests__/review.test.ts::does not fabricate a supplier or ERP integration contract in preview or approve

mappings.criterion: removes a card immediately on Reject while leaving the rest unchanged
mappings.test: apps/demo/src/__tests__/decisions-recommendations.test.tsx::removes a card immediately on Reject while leaving the rest unchanged

mappings.criterion: completes five-stage review and routes to In Progress on Approve
mappings.test: apps/demo/src/__tests__/workflow-2-review-approve-in-progress.test.tsx::completes five-stage review and routes to In Progress on Approve

recommendations: Consider consolidating the three near-identical workflow-*-review-approve-in-progress test harnesses into a parameterized helper on a later cleanup slice.

reviewerSignoff.statement: Intent-review spec_fidelity=pass; 6/6 ACs mapped; demo+contracts tests green. Approve merge for #401.

ownerSignoff.statement: Acknowledged review PASS; WF2–4 mock Decision lifecycle verified by unit and integration tests.
